heading: Definitions
label: 3701 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle B (§§ 1311–1352) of title XIII of div. A of , , , known as the Department of Defense Cooperative Threat Reduction Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of subtitle B to the Code, see Short Title note set out below and Tables.Pub. L. 113–291128 Stat. 3595Dec. 19, 2014

children.text: The term “congressional defense committees” has the meaning given that term in .section 101(a)(16) of title 10
The term “Cooperative Threat Reduction funds” means funds appropriated pursuant to an authorization of appropriations for the Program, or otherwise made available to the Program.
The term “Program” means the Cooperative Threat Reduction Program of the Department of Defense established under .section 3711 of this title
